review_title: The only recommended tool for container orchestration
description: We are using this tool from last 2 years on production and we really never faced any issues related to CI/CD. Also once it is deployed it really automates lot of processes.
author: Ranu S.
pros: Easily configurable using YAML file. Highly scalable at production level. Pods, cluster and services are highly configurable and awesome features available in this tool. Easily deployable on cloud servers and fast CI/CD setup. User friendly dashboard and huge community support available.
cons: Needs very in depth knowledge before working on it. Process of creating and setup PODs and Cluster very expensive service. Terminal commands are confusing for beginners.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Simplifying Kubernetes Cluster Deployment with Kubermatic Kubernetes Platform
description: Kubermatic Kubernetes Platform is a robust solution that simplifies Kubernetes cluster deployment and management. With its intuitive interface, powerful automation capabilities, and top-notch security features, the platform is an excellent choice for organizations seeking to optimize their Kubernetes workloads.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: security features. Kubermatic Kubernetes Platform has integrated security features that protect Kubernetes clusters from malicious attacks, such as credential management, network policies, and pod security policies.
cons: sharing the document would have made the process much easier.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: 3 benefit use Kubermatic Kubernetes Platform 1. Kubernetes automatically scales your cluster based on your needs. This will save costs and resources. 2. Kubernetes platform can be run on a variety of infrastructure including on-premise datacenter, public cloud, private cloud or hybrid cloud. 3. Kubernetes can be deployed consistently across Infrastructure. Containers allow to implement the concept of immutable Infrastructure. All the setup and component dependencies needed to run the application can be included and bundled in the Container itself.
